note: A Look record for the SKY family (E3.4): the family-generic {look_family, params} envelope, where `params` carries the non-palette dome CONSTANTS and `palette_ref` names the day/night palette the hour is resolved against — the ONE palette source (game/world/day_night.gd loads the same record; a content-empty game falls back to day_night.gd's DEFAULT_KEYS). The look reads `palette(hour)` with the hour as a PURE input (law 5 — never a clock read). The constants below are PROMOTED VERBATIM from runtime/game/shaders/sky.gdshader's sky() and the hour->sun_size/night math in game/world/day_night.gd — a MOVE, not a retune; byte-identical to what those files compute. gouache was look #1; sky is look #2, still not the schema. An unknown look_family fails LOUDLY (game/world/look_data.gd, Wash's look registry), never a silent fallback.
